summary: John and James spoke at 3:47 pm on 17th March 2022. John asked James about his motivation, which James attributed to his love for video games. They discussed their favorite games, programming skills, and a potential collaboration on a dog care app. James shared his project of creating a computer game based on childhood sketches. John admired James' passion and expressed interest in trying VR gaming together. They agreed to meet for VR gaming the following Saturday.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Hey! Glad to finally talk to you. I want to ask you, what motivates you?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Hey John! Video games give me tons of joy and excitement, so they keep me motivated!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Cool, James! I'm a big video game fan too. They help me relax after a long day. What game are you currently enjoying the most?

history.speaker: James
history.content: I'm totally into The Witcher 3 right now. The story and atmosphere are amazing. Have you tried it yet?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Haven't played it yet, but I hear it's awesome. Gonna give it a go. BTW, just signed up for a programming class. Have you ever done any programming?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Programming is an awesome skill. I tried it out one in college and now it`s all my life. Good luck in the class! Do you have any coding experience?

history.speaker: John
history.content: I did a bit of coding in HTML and CSS a few years back. Thought I'd refresh those skills in this course. What languages do you like most and any projects you've done?

history.speaker: James
history.content: I've worked with Python and C++. I've built a website and also created some game mods. Here is one example.

history.speaker: John
history.content: That mod looks amazing! The graphics are awesome. What other programming languages have you worked with?

history.speaker: James
history.content: I haven’t worked with any other programming languages, but I hope to work in the future.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Maybe in the future we will develop mobile applications together? Do you like the idea?

history.speaker: James
history.content: It would be cool! For example, we could write some kind of application for dogs. By the way, my dogs.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Aww, they're adorable! What are the names of your pets? And what are your plans for the app?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Max and Daisy. Will be actually cool to build an app for dog walking and pet care. The goal is to connect pet owners with reliable dog walkers and provide helpful information on pet care.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Sounds good, James! Bet that app would find a lot of buyers. What sets it apart from other existing apps?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Thanks, John! The personal touch really sets it apart. Users can add their pup's preferences/needs - just like they were customizing it for them. Making it unique for each owner and pup.

history.speaker: John
history.content: That's a great idea! Your pup is gonna love it. Speaking of personal touches, what motivates you to work on your programming projects?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Creating something and seeing it come to life gives me a great sense of accomplishment. It's an amazing feeling. I write down all my goals in a notebook. It's very satisfying to check off each one when it's done.

history.speaker: John
history.content: What are you working on that has you feeling so accomplished?

history.speaker: James
history.content: I'm working on something I've wanted to do since I was a kid. Even as a child, I made some sketches of the main character. Back then I was just drawing comics, but now I want to turn it into a computer game. It's a project that has me really excited.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, James! That's amazing. What made you decide to work on it and create your own game?

history.speaker: James
history.content: I'm always excited to combine my favorite passions: gaming and storytelling. It's great creating my own project and bringing my ideas to life, plus the challenge is really enjoyable!

history.speaker: John
history.content: That sounds really fulfilling! Combining your passions to make something new must be so exciting. Can't wait to see the outcome.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Thanks John! It's super exciting. I'll keep you updated on the progress. Perhaps, thanks to your knowledge of HTML, I'll invite you to help with some things in my game.

history.speaker: John
history.content: It will be great to work with you, James.

history.speaker: James
history.content: I'll be looking forward to it. By the way, yesterday I went bowling and got 2 strikes. I love bowling!

history.speaker: John
history.content: I'm sure you're very good at this. Unfortunately, I can’t share my love for him with you, my fingers are too big. Perhaps I should take up exercise, at least start going for a run in the morning. And I also don’t like bowling itself, to be honest.

history.speaker: James
history.content: It's a pity, it would be nice to go play with you one day.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Well, I'm sure we can do something else. We can play slot machines and arcades, for example.

history.speaker: James
history.content: The last time I played at the slot machines, I was so engrossed in the game that I didn't notice my wallet being taken out of my pocket. Sad story.

history.speaker: John
history.content: I'm sorry to hear it. Well, I'll be nearby, I'll look after your pockets.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Still, maybe we can try something different?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Heard about VR gaming? It's pretty immersive. We can try it together!

history.speaker: James
history.content: I tried it - it's crazy how real it feels! Have you given it a shot?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Tried it a few times, it's insane how immersive that experience can be. Can't wait to try it together with you.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yeah, VR gaming is awesome! Let`s do it next Saturday!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Agreed, James!

history.speaker: John

history.speaker: James
history.content: Check out this pic of my best buds having a blast in the park. They've brought so much joy to my life. My two dogs are the best pals ever, right?

history.speaker: John
history.content: They look like they're having a blast! Can they do any tricks?

history.speaker: James
history.content: They can do tricks like sit, stay, paw, and rollover. Here's a picture of Daisy waiting for a treat. I've done lots of training and they've picked it up fast. They're like my family.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Aww, they're adorable! Pets are the best - they must make life so much better. I want one so bad, but I'm not there yet. Someday!

history.speaker: James
history.content: A pet would truly be great for you! They bring so much love and companionship. If you're interested, I can help find the perfect one for you - you'd make a great pet parent!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Cheers, James! Yeah, I'll keep that in mind. Appreciate the offer.

history.speaker: James
history.content: No problem, John! Let me know whenever you need assistance. Take care!

history.content: Not least because of this. I love football, but, of course, the most important reason is to improve yourself. But it’s nice if it’s also connected with something you like.

history.speaker: John
history.content: I completely agree! By the way, did you watch the Liverpool vs Chelsea match?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Of course, they played well! As I like to say, there is no sport better than football, no club better than Liverpool! I don't miss a single match of theirs!

history.speaker: John
history.content: It looks like you really root for this team!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Absolutely! They are forever in my heart, they are a great team. I hope they become champions next season!

history.speaker: John
history.content: As a Manchester City fan, I can't agree with you. You'll see, our two teams will fight for the championship, and mine will win!

history.speaker: James
history.content: I'm sure you're wrong, John. Manchester City are in bad form and their transfer policy is terrible!

history.speaker: John
history.content: You may be right, but the City manager can handle it, you'll see!

history.speaker: James
history.content: I bet we'll be higher than you in the final standings!

history.speaker: John
history.content: I'll take the bet, James! This will be a great battle!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Sure, John!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Hey John, how's it going? A lot has happened for me lately, some good and some not so great. I`m lucky to have at least two people who always help me out when I'm struggling. What about you?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Gad to hear you have your support system ready. It's crucial, especially during hard times. For me, it's been quite an emotional rollercoaster. Last week, I started my blog about coding. It's exciting and kinda scary too. This is the first picture I uploaded there.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Wow, starting a blog about coding is awesome! Must be so exciting. What do you think about it?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Thanks, James! It has been an awesome and challenging experience. I'm loving sharing my coding journey with others and tracking everything. It's a great way to connect with other coders.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Congrats on your coding journey! What`s more new in your world?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Well, I bought a lot of new books, and now my bookcase is almost completely filled!

history.speaker: James
history.content: What genre do you enjoy reading?

history.speaker: John
history.content: I'm a big fan of sci-fi and fantasy books. Epic fantasy series with immersive world-building and intricate storylines are what I enjoy reading. Just getting lost in the pages of a great story is a wonderful escape from reality.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Cool! Are there any book series that you love and would recommend to others?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Definitely! Two of my favorites are "The Stormlight Archive" and "Kingkiller Chronicle". If SF is your thing, check out "The Expanse" series. It's epic!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Thanks for the recommendations, John! I'll definitely check out those books. What makes them your favorites?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Glad you're giving these books a try! I'm obsessed with the way they create a magical world you can escape into - plus the characters feel really real. By the way, what's the name of the dog in this picture from your Facebook? It`s so cute!

history.speaker: James
history.content: This is Max – he's so lovable and playful. He brings me so much joy, especially in tough times.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Aww, he's adorable! I can tell Max brings you a lot of happiness. Pets are always such a great source of joy and love.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yeah, Max is great - he always cheers me up when I'm feeling down. Enjoying those cuddles with him!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Does he enjoy swimming?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yeah, he loves it! We usually hit the beach or lake, and he loves playing in the water. He's a pro swimmer!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Max must be having so much fun swimming and playing - it's the best!

history.speaker: James
history.content: He has a blast! Always a joy to see him so happy and carefree in his favorite activity.

history.speaker: John
history.content: He looks so happy - this is a great achievement of yours!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Thanks, John! I love making him happy.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Does Max have any special talents? He seems like quite the go-getter!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Max is a real go-getter! He's awesome at catching frisbees in mid-air - never misses!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, Max loves playing fetch! Does he also enjoy long walks?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yep! We love them; they're great exercise and give us fresh air. Here is a photo of us from a recent walk in the forest.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Where's that spot where you could take a stroll? Bet Max loves all those hikes.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Max and I love taking walks on this nearby trail. It's a mile from my house. It's so tranquil and a great way to relax and connect with nature.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, that looks awesome! Going for a nature walk is so refreshing, don't you think?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yeah, John! It's so relaxing and refreshing. It helps me think straight and find my inner peace.

history.speaker: John
history.content: That park is so peaceful. What do you do when you're there alone?

history.speaker: James
history.content: When I'm there, I usually bring a book and just chill. It's like an escape from reality.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Sounds great, James! Taking breaks and switching up the scenery is a great way to feel recharged. Keep it up.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Definitely! Taking breaks is important for recharging. Thanks for the support!

history.speaker: John
history.content: No problem, always here to have your back. Take care of yourself!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Hey John, since our last chat, something awesome happened. Last Friday, I started introducing Max, Daisy and the new pup Ned. It was hard at first, but they're slowly adapting. It's sweet to watch them bond and have fun together.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, that's cool, James! Seeing them bonding and having a great time is so sweet. Do you have a picture of them together?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yep, I got a great pic last night. Check it out!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, they look so cute! I can almost feel the love and joy in this photo. These last few days really got me thinking about my own future.

history.speaker: James
history.content: What's been on your mind regarding the future?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Lately, I've been thinking about my career and where I want to be in the future. I'm driven and passionate, and I also want to make a positive impact on the world.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Gotcha, John. Finding a way to make a difference matters. Have you thought about any ideas on how to do that?

history.speaker: John
history.content: Yeah, I have. I've been looking into volunteering and thinking of going into non-profit work. I want to put my passions and abilities to use for causes I really care about.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Wow, John that sounds great! I'm sure with your skills and passion, you could do some really cool things with nonprofits. Here's a pic I took when I volunteered last month. It was really rewarding to see how little gifts can do so much!

history.speaker: John
history.content: That's awesome, James! Was it cool to see the impact of the gifts? Can you tell me more about the organization you volunteered with?

history.speaker: James
history.content: It was great to see how much a simple act of kindness can mean to someone in need. I volunteered with an organization that provides necessary items to those who are less fortunate. It felt so rewarding to help, even if it was in a small way.

history.speaker: John
history.content: I think this is exactly what I need. Can you take me there this weekend?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Of course I can! I think there are still some of the previous staff there and I can even introduce you to them.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Thank you very much! Will there be some kind of interview required?

history.speaker: James
history.content: No, this is not necessary. All you need is to be a friendly and polite person, and also have a great desire to help people. I'm sure you will succeed!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Thanks for your support! I want to make this world a better place, and with your help I will definitely achieve my goal.

history.speaker: James
history.content: We can do this together!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Thanks, James. Your support means a lot to me. I'm determined to make a positive impact.

history.speaker: James
history.content: You got this! Stay focused on your dreams and don't give up.

history.content: Hey John! Long time no talk - hope you're doing well. Guess what? Last week I actually won an online gaming tournament! It was such an exciting experience and it blew my mind when I won. Winning felt so good and it really motivated me to keep improving.

history.content: Hey James! Congrats on winning the online gaming tournament! It's super fulfilling to see your hard work pay off. So happy for you!

history.content: Thanks! It was really fulfilling to see my hard work pay off with a victory in the tournament. How are you?

history.content: Feeling the tug of emotion lately. Determined and passionate on one hand, but feeling overwhelmed and stressed on the other. Balancing personal and professional is kind of a challenge. How have you been?

history.content: Yeah, staying balanced can be tough. I'm trying to take breaks from my hobbies and do other things. Lately I've become interested in extreme sports. Yesterday, for example, I was doing rope jumping. The highest height I jumped from was 150 meters!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, how cool! What other extreme sport have you tried?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Just three days ago, I was surfing. Catching a wave is so cool! It's strange, but it relaxes me so much. How do you like to relax?

history.speaker: John
history.content: I like to relax by reading. I love entering the imaginative worlds of authors - it's a fun escape from reality.

history.speaker: James
history.content: I also love to read, especially while snuggled under the covers on a cold winter day. But now it’s summer and I want something more exciting! By the way, I bought air tickets to Toronto, and I’m leaving the day after tomorrow evening.

history.content: Take care, bye!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Hi James! I just started playing chess to get better at strategy. I'm loving it! Have you ever tried it out?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Hey John! Yeah, I've played chess before. It's a game that really tests your strategy. It's great that you're enjoying it!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Yeah, chess is really fun! It's like solving an endless puzzle and always trying to outwit your opponent.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yeah, it's tough, but fun when you figure it out. Do you play with friends or online?

history.speaker: John
history.content: I'm playing mostly online for now, but I also joined a chess club and practice with others. Here's a pic from an intense game I played lately.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Wow, looks intense! What sparked your interest in chess?

history.speaker: John
history.content: I've always been drawn to strategy games and wanted to challenge myself. Plus, I believe chess can improve decision-making skills.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Great reason for playing chess - it will definitely help you develop your skills!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Thanks, James! I'm excited to see how playing chess can enhance my strategic thinking in everyday situations. Do you have any tips for improvement?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Definitely! Studying opening moves and strategies and analyzing your games to spot weaknesses are great ways to improve.

history.speaker: John
history.content: I'll definitely look into that. Appreciate the advice!

history.speaker: James
history.content: No worries, John! Happy to help. Just let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Your support means a lot to me. You're a true friend! Remember this photo from elementary school?

history.speaker: James
history.content: That looks fun. But I don’t remember at all under what circumstances we took this picture. What's the story behind it?

history.speaker: John
history.content: This is from when we were 10 and we were really into skateboarding. We had a group of friends who often go to the skate park with. We would help each other learn new tricks and have a great time. Those friends made the experience even better and their friendship meant a lot to us.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Indeed, I remember this moment. We loved skateboards back then, sometimes we even left class early to do it. I still like to go for a ride sometimes, and I even taught my dogs how to balance on it.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow! Do they enjoy it, or do you have to encourage them to play with the board?

history.speaker: James
history.content: They love it! They chase after it and run with it. It's a great way for them to get some exercise.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, that's great! Keeping active and happy is great for both of you.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Yep! Staying active with them builds a strong bond and makes us both happy.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Yeah, the bond between us and our pets is amazing. They bring a lot of joy and love. It’s a pity that I don’t have pets, I’ll definitely get one someday. By the way, how was your trip?

history.speaker: James
history.content: Everything went great! In addition, I even managed to get out to another country. The city of Nuuk, if you know. I stayed there quite a bit, but at least I had one more country to add to my bucket list!

history.speaker: John
history.content: This is awesome, James! Surely you brought a lot of impressions with you!

history.speaker: James
history.content: Certainly! And not only impressions, I also brought souvenirs. For both you and your Jill!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Thank you very much, Jill will be delighted!

history.speaker: James
history.content: You're welcome! By the way, look who came to see me!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Nice pic, James! Who are they?

history.speaker: James
history.content: That's my sister and my dogs. We were just chilling together yesterday, and they bring so much happiness to my life.

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wow, they look so happy! It's awesome that you get to spend time with your sister and your furry friends. The bond you have with them is really strong.

history.speaker: James
history.content: I'm blessed to have a close bond with my sister and our furry friends. We have a great time together, like a family!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Family and friends are really amazing, James. They show us so much love and joy. I'm grateful for the connection I have with my siblings. Things can be tough sometimes, but their support means everything to me.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Fully agreed! My sister and I were also near the ocean and watched such a wonderful sunset!

history.speaker: John
history.content: Wonderful photo! It's amazing how you can capture a moment and capture it in a photograph.

history.speaker: James
history.content: Thanks, John! This is just a good shot, nothing more. I took a lot of shots yesterday and chose the best one to send to you.

history.speaker: John

history.content: I have to go, I'm tired over the last two days. Bye!
